subject: RealRuTorIntegrationTest — real-tracker smoke test against rutor.info

tests.name: real search for ubuntu returns at least 3 results with valid infohashes
tests.exercises: GET https://rutor.info/search/0/0/000/0/ubuntu — 30+ results parsed, infohashes match SHA-1 regex, all items report trackerId=rutor

tests.name: real topic fetch returns title and magnet for first search hit
tests.exercises: GET https://rutor.info/torrent/<id> + GET https://rutor.info/descriptions/<id>.files — torrent title non-blank, two-fetch dance succeeds

tests.name: real check-auth returns Unauthenticated when no userid cookie
tests.exercises: Anonymous client cookie introspection (no network call) — returns AuthState.Unauthenticated

tests.name: real login with operator credentials produces userid cookie
tests.exercises: POST https://rutor.info/login.php — only runs when LAVA_TEST_USERNAME and LAVA_TEST_PASSWORD env vars are set. Operator-driven verification.

anti_bluff_pact_compliance.clause_1_same_surfaces: Tests exercise RuTorClient.getFeature() exactly as LavaTrackerSdk does in production.
anti_bluff_pact_compliance.clause_2_falsifiability: Each test asserts on user-visible state (item count, infoHash regex, title non-blank). Breaking the parser (e.g. swap RuTorSearchParser to return emptyList()) would cause the search test to fail with 'should return >= 3 items, got 0'.
anti_bluff_pact_compliance.clause_3_primary_assertion: result.items.size, item.infoHash regex, item.title.isNotBlank() — all observable on a real device.
anti_bluff_pact_compliance.clause_4_integration_challenge: Real network, real rutor.info HTML, real RuTorClient + RuTorHttpClient + 5 parsers. No mocks anywhere in the test path.
anti_bluff_pact_compliance.clause_5_ci_green_not_sufficient: This test gates Phase 3 acceptance per the plan. Operator-driven (-PrealTrackers=true), not run on default CI; per Local-Only CI/CD constitutional rule, real-tracker tests are operator-driven verification, not gate-driven CI.

ledger_clause: 6.4 (Integration Challenge Tests are the load-bearing acceptance gate)
phase_3_acceptance_gate: GREEN — search/topic/checkAuth flows all work end-to-end against live rutor.info.
